svg.title: Anhedral master stack map
svg.desc: A deterministic eight-stage map of Anhedral planning, safe generation, one TypeScript workspace, connected product capabilities, cloud provisioning, generated commands, agent experience, and release operations.
svg.text: Plan, generate, provision, release, and operate every surface from one TypeScript workspace.
Ask first: project name + custom domain
CLI: create · init · add · ui · doctor
assets.example.com ─ Worker domain → Assets Worker → private R2
updates.example.com ─ Worker domain → Updater Worker → private R2
STOP: user handles sign-in, purchases, secrets, Generate/Reveal, and Submit.
Computer use drives consoles; lead agent owns mutations; subagents verify.
Server-only secrets · exact CORS · rate limits + headers · Electron isolation · least privilege · private buckets
one convenient command surface for the complete infrastructure
manifest · env contract · docs · provider ledger
verify the smallest scope first · never weaken a failing gate
